channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Python nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐍 nicedreamzapp/claude-code-local (2119 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nicedreamzapp

📝 Repository: nicedreamzapp/claude-code-local

📄 Descrizione: Run Claude Code 100% on-device with local AI on Apple Silicon. MLX-native Anthropic-API server, 65 tok/s Qwen 3.5 122B, Llama 3.3 70B, Gemma 4 31B. Private, offline, airgap-ready. Built for NDA / legal / healthcare workflows.

⭐ Stelle: 2119

🍴 Forks: 406

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: abliterated ai-privacy airgap ambient-computing anthropic apple-silicon browser-agent claude-code gemma llama local-ai local-llm macos mlx mlx-lm offline-ai on-device-ai private-ai qwen voice-ai

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-26T06:43:30Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-24T03:01:23Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐍 OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano (2090 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenMOSS

📝 Repository: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano

📄 Descrizione: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.

⭐ Stelle: 2090

🍴 Forks: 281

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: audio-tokenizer chinese english multi-modality multilingual realtime streaming-audio tts voice-clone

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-10T16:25:07Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-24T04:45:23Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
